metadata.description: Gary Kong's customized workflow collection - a focused fork of wshobson/agents with 5 essential plugins (llm-application-dev, machine-learning-ops, openspec, python-development, unit-testing) optimized for personal development workflows

plugins.name: llm-application-dev
plugins.description: LLM application development with LangGraph, RAG systems, vector search, and AI agent architectures - customized from wshobson/agents for Gary's workflow

plugins.name: machine-learning-ops
plugins.description: ML model training pipelines, hyperparameter tuning, model deployment automation, experiment tracking, and MLOps workflows - customized from wshobson/agents

plugins.name: openspec
plugins.description: OpenSpec experimental workflow for artifact-driven development with change management and verification - Gary Kong's custom implementation

plugins.name: python-development
plugins.description: Modern Python development with Python 3.12+, Django, FastAPI, async patterns, and production best practices - customized from wshobson/agents

plugins.name: unit-testing
plugins.description: Unit and integration test automation for Python and JavaScript with debugging support - customized from wshobson/agents for Gary's workflow
